title: Domain 2: Fundamentals of Generative AI (24%)
description: What foundation models are, the vocabulary of tokens, embeddings, and prompts, what generative AI is good and bad at, and how AWS delivers it.

lessons.title: Foundation Models, Tokens, and Embeddings
objectives: Explain what a foundation model and a large language model are
Describe at a high level how a model generates the next token

lessons.title: Use Cases and Limitations
objectives: Identify strong business use cases for generative AI
Explain limitations: hallucination, nondeterminism, bias, and knowledge cutoff
Judge when generative AI is the wrong tool

lessons.title: Generative AI on AWS
objectives: Describe what Amazon Bedrock provides and why it's managed
Place Amazon Q, SageMaker JumpStart, and PartyRock
State the business benefits AWS highlights for generative AI
